title: NOMAD — AI Travel Planner
short_description: AI-powered travel planner with routes, translation, compass & bookings
full_description:
NOMAD is your intelligent travel companion that makes trip planning effortless.

KEY FEATURES:

🗺️ AI Route Planning
Create personalized travel routes based on your interests, budget, and pace. Our AI optimizes your itinerary for the best experience.

🧭 Smart Compass
Navigate with augmented reality compass that points to nearby points of interest. Never miss a hidden gem.

🌐 Language Shield
Instantly translate signs, menus, and conversations. Offline support for 50+ languages.

📅 Easy Bookings
Book excursions and activities directly through the app with GetYourGuide integration.

💳 Group Payments
Split travel expenses with friends effortlessly. Track who paid what.

⭐ Pro Features:
• Unlimited AI route generation
• Offline maps & translation
• Priority booking
• Group expense management
• Ad-free experience

Whether you're exploring a new city or backpacking across continents, NOMAD helps you travel smarter, not harder.
